name: miniapp-rent-platform
description: Multi-tenant rental + retail SaaS platform. PR0: monorepo skeleton (D10) + self-built Midway.js backend guards.

scripts.check:frontends: npm --prefix packages/app-c run check && npm --prefix packages/admin run check
scripts.check: npm run guard:backend-architecture && npm run test && npm run guard:prod-config && npm run check:frontends
scripts.check:all: pnpm -r run check || true && npm run check
